---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with NeuroTK
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: SakshiRa
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
```sh
# command you ran
neurotk validate --images ... --labels ... --out report.json
```

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Paste the full error message or unexpected output.

## Environment
- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- Python version: (e.g. 3.10)
- NeuroTK version: (run `pip show neurotk`)
- Install method: pip / Docker / source

## Sample data
If possible, attach or describe the input files that trigger the issue.
